overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Access High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (GHYB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a broad-maturity, USD-denominated, high-yield corporate bond index selected by debt service and leverage. The underlying index includes US and Canada domiciled bonds GHYB was launched on Sep 5, 2017 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
infoTable: FTSE Goldman Sachs High Yield Corporate Bond Index
